page_metadata.biotools__summary: Regulation Simulator of Interaction between miRNA and Competing RNAs (ceRNA) is a R package that simulates regulations of ceRNA (Competing Endogenous) expression levels after a expression level change in one or more miRNA/mRNAs.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Regulation Simulator of Interaction between miRNA and Competing RNAs (ceRNA) is a R package that simulates regulations of ceRNA (Competing Endogenous) expression levels after a expression level change in one or more miRNA/mRNAs.
